falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes below the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bearish trend would contradict the current HOLD signal and suggest a different market phase than the historical bottom pattern implies.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in the blowoff score would indicate a blowoff top phase, directly contradicting the current UNKNOWN verdict and HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: RSI (14-period) crosses above 70 and remains above for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained overbought conditions would suggest a potential reversal or exhaustion, invalidating the current HOLD and implying a different market dynamic than the historical bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
